silhouette: Upright soft pointed teardrop silhouette with a slimmer, gentler body than Padaruna and a calm rounded base; the head never drifts sideways, leans right, rounds off, or loses the pointed apex.
face: Closed smiling eyes and a relaxed reassuring mouth.
body_language: Warm, safe, emotionally open, low-threat presence.
do_not_change: Keep the silhouette slim, soft, and gentle rather than energetic or full-bodied.
Do not copy a right-drifting or side-leaning head/top silhouette; Padarana's head stays upright, soft, and pointed.
Do not confuse her warmth with passivity.
Do not make her Padaruna's fuller energetic body, Nia's angled brow, a right-drifting side-leaning head, or Muci's open-eyed protagonist face.
